# Juntang Wang

> M.S. Data Science student @ Harvard. AI for Science researcher working on graph and spectral methods for biomedical inference. Previously B.S. with Distinction *cum laude*, Duke & Duke Kunshan University.

## Publications

- [StageGuard: Physiologically Constrained Sleep Staging — KDD 2026](https://qqgjyx.com/#stageguard)
- [Mixing Configurations for Downstream Prediction — ICML 2026](https://qqgjyx.com/#mixconfig)
- [Brain-Inspired Perspective on Configurations — BICS 2025 (Oral)](https://qqgjyx.com/#infantconfig)
- [Can the Mammalian Circadian System Adapt to the Martian Photoperiod? — CNS 2025](https://qqgjyx.com/#martianclock)
- [Analyzing Temperature-Induced Phase Transitions in LK99 — MC17 2025](https://qqgjyx.com/#lk99)
